headline: Does Brown-Forman’s Mixed FY26 Results And Flat FY27 Outlook Alter The Bull Case For BF.B?
summary: In early June 2026, Brown-Forman reported fiscal fourth-quarter 2026 results showing net sales of US$912 million and full-year sales of US$3.93 billion, with earnings per share from continuing operations easing to US$0.12 for the quarter and US$1.53 for the year, while also affirming a regular quarterly dividend of US$0.2310 per share. The combination of better-than-expected fourth-quarter revenue, strong performance in emerging markets, and new products like Jack Daniel’s Tennessee...
